testcase.name: test_trial_reminders_send_requires_auth
testcase.failure: tests/test_trial_reminders.py:52: in test_trial_reminders_send_requires_auth assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 403 E assert 403 == 401 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_trial_reminders_send_requires_admin

skipped.message: Regular user not available for testing

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_trial_reminders.py:58: Regular user not available for testing

testcase.name: test_trial_reminders_send_admin_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_trial_reminders.py:73: in test_trial_reminders_send_admin_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
